subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the Most Great Ocean and hath been honored with that which is the purpose enshrined in the Tablets of God, the All-Subduing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بالبحر الاعظم و تشرف بما هو المقصود فی الواح الله المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
